question: Chapters
feedback: The text lists the main sections of the thesis (ievada, trim nodaļām un secinājumiem), but it would be more helpful to provide a clear and detailed outline of each section.

question: Description
feedback: The text briefly describes the contents of each section, but it is very general. It would be better to provide more specific information about what can be expected from each section.

question: Structure
feedback: Yes, it can be easily understood that the thesis has an introduction, three main sections and conclusions. However, a clearer explanation of how these sections relate to each other would make the structure even more understandable.
